sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁפה

Transliteration: shâphâh

Phonetic: shaw-faw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to sweep bare, scrape
    1. (Niphal) to be wind-swept, be bare, be scraped barren (by wind)
    2. (Pual) to be bare, be laid bare

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2440

Part(s) of speech: Verb
